doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: It cites specific statutes, a “Jones v. DeSantis” implementation, and an internal reference (“FL DoE 2025-EC-07”) that are not recognizable/confirmable as an actual Florida Division of Elections memo, making the document very likely invente
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 93  
REASON: The memo’s content and cited references (e.g., “FL DoE 2025-EC-07,” specific statute §98.0751(2)(a)(5), “Florida Auditor General’s 2024 report,” and the claimed “Jones v. DeSantis” linkage) do not correspond to verifiable, typical Florida Division of Elections documentation and appears to be an invented legal policy summary.
